title: sorbus mairei
intro: Sorbus mairei, also known as the Chinese rowan or Maire's rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to mountainous regions in China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorbus mairei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures.
